edgesVerified.reasoning: Process orchestration with effect routing fundamentally needs sub-harness invocation with isolation. Without isolated child runs, there is no mechanism for the coordinator to delegate work. The coordinator pattern described in GAP-AGENT-003 is literally 'fan-out tasks to different harnesses,' which requires GAP-AGENT-001's sub-harness invocation.

Multi-harness parallel dispatch is impossible without concurrent effect execution. GAP-PAR-001 provides the wave-building and concurrent invocation infrastructure that GAP-PAR-003 extends to multiple harnesses. Without concurrent execution at all, multi-harness parallelism is meaningless.

Progress tracking requires streaming output capture. Progress signals (percentage, current step) are extracted from harness output streams. Without streaming capture, the only data point is 'running' or 'done' -- no progress granularity is possible.
CC plugin compatibility layer needs marketplace protocol to discover CC plugins. Without marketplace support, CC plugins would need manual installation, defeating the purpose of compatibility.

Remote sessions over WebSocket need the host contract layer as the API surface. The WebSocket transport delivers messages but the contract defines what operations are available (startRun, getStatus, etc.). Without the contract, there is no defined protocol for remote interaction.
Memory consolidation merges and prunes extracted memories. Without memory extraction (GAP-STATE-001), there are no memories to consolidate. This is a strict data-flow dependency.
Run forking creates a new run from a journal point. Session rewind provides the journal fork-from-point capability. They share the same underlying mechanism -- forking diverges the journal timeline.

Fork-join spawns parallel branches that execute independently. This requires multi-harness parallel dispatch to run branches concurrently on different harnesses. Without parallel dispatch, fork-join degenerates to sequential execution.
Streaming message rendering displays real-time model output. This requires streaming output capture from harnesses. Without output streaming, there is nothing to render in real-time.

Multi-step workflow composition is essentially in-effect process chaining. Workflows need typed input/output flow between steps, which is exactly what process chaining provides. Without pipelines, workflow steps cannot pass data forward.

cycleCheck.details: Topological sort completed successfully across all 78 nodes and 95 edges. The graph is a DAG. Potential cycle candidate GAP-ECO-001 <-> GAP-ECO-003 was verified as one-directional: GAP-ECO-001 depends on GAP-ECO-003 but not vice versa. GAP-ECO-003 depends on GAP-SEC-001 which is CLOSED.

parallelTrackIndependence.details: The 8 identified parallel tracks share no edges between them at the first layer. Cross-track dependencies only appear at deeper layers through CLOSED foundation gaps (GAP-SEC-001, GAP-PROMPT-001, GAP-SESSION-001, GAP-HADAPT-001). These CLOSED gaps act as satisfied preconditions, not active constraints.
